Value Set: Visually assess for whether underweight (for drug dose calculation) Choices

Documentation for this format

valueExpression.name: weight-measured-or-estimated
valueExpression.expression: iif (%resource.item I where (I.linkId = '6' and I.answer[0].value <> 0), %resource.item I where (I.linkId = '6' and I.answer[0].value <> 0), iif (%resource.item I where (I.linkId = 'previousWeight' and I.answer[0].value <> 0),%resource.item I where (I.linkId = 'previousWeight' and I.answer[0].value <> 0), %resource.item I where (I.linkId = '8' and I.answer[0].value <> 0)))

valueExpression.name: weight
valueExpression.expression: iif(%resource.item I where (I.linkId = '6' and I.answer[0].value>0) ,%resource.item I where I.linkId = '6',%resource.item I where I.linkId = 'previousWeight')

name: EmCareB6
title: EmCare.B6. Measurements
description: Temperature, Weight, NUAC and z-score measurement

valueExpression.name: estimation
valueExpression.expression: (%resource.item I where (I.linkId = '6' and I.answer[0].value <> 12) -0.7 - wfh-mean ) div wfh-sd
(%resource.item I where (I.linkId = '6' and I.answer[0].value <> 0) or (I.linkId = '8' and I.answer[0].value <> 0) ) and %resource.item I (where I.linkId = 'ageMonth' and I.answer[0].value > 24 )

valueExpression.name: height
valueExpression.expression: iif(%resource.item I where (I.linkId = '10' and I.answer[0].value = true),(%resource.item I where (I.linkId = '9' and I.answer[0].value = true))[0]answer[0].value,(%resource.item I where (I.linkId = '12' and I.answer[0].value = true))[0]answer[0].value - 0.7)

valueExpression.name: wfl-z-score
valueExpression.expression: %resource.item I where (I.linkId = '12' and I.answer[0].value = true).answer[0].value - %qItem.wfl-mean ) div %qItem.wfl-sd
